info.name: United Fillings Backend API (Cookie Auth)
info.description: Complete API collection with HTTP-only cookie authentication

request.description: Check if API is running and reachable
One-time setup for the first SUPER_ADMIN account.
Get list of all admin users with their workload stats (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Create a new admin user (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Get details of specific admin user (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Get detailed workload statistics for specific admin (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Activate or deactivate an admin (SUPER_ADMIN only). Status: ACTIVE or INACTIVE
Delete admin user (SUPER_ADMIN only). Cannot delete if admin has assigned clients.
Minimal list of admins for assigning compliances (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN)
Server uptime and stats (SUPER_ADMIN only)

query.description: Filter by role: SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, or USER
Filter by status: ACTIVE or INACTIVE

request.description: Get all users with optional filters (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Get details of any user by ID (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Update status of any user (SUPER_ADMIN only). Status: ACTIVE or INACTIVE
Get users who are not yet members of this company (ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN only)
Delete any user (SUPER_ADMIN only). Cannot delete SUPER_ADMIN or ADMIN with assigned clients.

query.description: Search by name, company, email, phone

request.description:
Get company statistics (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN only)
- Total companies
- Active/Inactive counts
- Companies with/without members

query.description: Search by name, registration number, or email

request.description:
List companies (role-based filtering)
- SUPER_ADMIN: sees all
- ADMIN: sees companies of assigned clients
- USER: sees companies where they are members

Create new company
- SUPER_ADMIN: any client
- ADMIN: only assigned clients
- USER: auto-added as OWNER

Get company details
- SUPER_ADMIN: any company
- ADMIN: companies of assigned clients
- USER: only if member

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Updated Tech Solutions Pvt Ltd",
  "registrationNumber": "CIN12345ABC",
  "email": "info@techsolutions.com",
  "phone": "9876543211",
  "address": {
    "street": "456 New Street",
    "city": "Mumbai",
    "state": "Maharashtra",
    "pincode": "400002",
    "country": "India"
  },
  "status": "ACTIVE"
}

request.description:
Update company
- SUPER_ADMIN: any company + can change status
- ADMIN: companies of assigned clients
- USER (OWNER): their companies only
Note: status can only be changed by SUPER_ADMIN

Delete company (SUPER_ADMIN only)
- Removes company from client's companies array
- Permanently deletes company

Add member to company
- SUPER_ADMIN: any company
- ADMIN: companies of assigned clients
- USER (OWNER): their companies only

Roles: OWNER, EDITOR, VIEWER

Remove member from company
- SUPER_ADMIN: any company
- ADMIN: companies of assigned clients
- USER (OWNER): their companies only

Note: Cannot remove last OWNER

Update member role
- SUPER_ADMIN: any company
- ADMIN: companies of assigned clients
- USER (OWNER): their companies only

Roles: OWNER, EDITOR, VIEWER
Note: Cannot downgrade last OWNER

Get compliance statistics for the dashboard

Get all marketplace services
Get details of a specific service
Get all events for logged-in client (USER role)
Get upcoming compliance deadlines (USER role)
Get ALL events for ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN across all clients
Get all events for a specific client (Admin view)
Update compliance event status (ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN)
Generates Google Auth URL or syncs if already connected
Check if user has an active Google connection
Revokes tokens and wipes synced events
Internal: Google Calendar push notification receiver
Create Razorpay Order for Consultation, Compliance, or Service
Verify Razorpay payment and update entity status
